What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more

    Noise Control Sound Isolation

    About this item

    • REBUILT FOR COMFORT — AirPods 4 have been redesigned for exceptional all-day comfort and greater stability. With a refined contour, shorter stem, and quick-press controls for music or calls.
    • PERSONALIZED SPATIAL AUDIO — Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you, creating a theater-like listening experience for music, TV shows, movies, games, and more.*
    • IMPROVED SOUND AND CALL QUALITY — AirPods 4 feature the Apple-designed H2 chip. Voice Isolation improves the quality of phone calls in loud conditions. Using advanced computational audio, it reduces background noise while isolating and clarifying the sound of your voice for whomever you’re speaking to.*
    • MAGICAL EXPERIENCE — Just say “Siri” or “Hey Siri” to play a song, make a call, or check your schedule.* And with Siri Interactions, now you can respond to Siri by simply nodding your head yes or shaking your head no.* Pair AirPods 4 by simply placing them near your device and tapping Connect on your screen.* Easily share a song or show between two sets of AirPods.* An optical in-ear sensor knows to play audio only when you’re wearing AirPods and pauses when you take them off. And you can track down your AirPods and Charging Case with the Find My app.*
    • LONG BATTERY LIFE — Get up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge. And get up to 30 hours of total listening time using the case.*
    • REDESIGNED CASE — The Charging Case comes with USB-C charging capabilities and is more than 10 percent smaller by volume than the previous generation.*
    • DUST, SWEAT, AND WATER RESISTANT — AirPods 4 and the Charging Case are rated IP54 dust, sweat, and water resistant, so they’ll withstand rain and heavy workouts.*
    • LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.
    › See more product details

    Technical Details

    Apple AirPods 4

    Size and Weight
    • AirPods 4 (each)
      • Height: 1.19 inches (30.2 mm)
      • Width: 0.72 inch (18.3 mm)
      • Depth: 0.71 inch (18.1 mm)
      • Weight: 0.15 ounce (4.3 grams)
    • Charging Case (USB-C)
      • Height: 1.82 inches (46.2 mm)
      • Width: 1.97 inches (50.1 mm)
      • Depth: 0.83 inch (21.2 mm)
      • Weight: 1.14 ounces (32.3 grams)

    Charging Case
    • Works with USB‑C connector

    Battery
    • AirPods 4
      • Up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge
      • Up to 4.5 hours of talk time on a single charge
    • AirPods 4 with Charging Case (USB-C)
      • Up to 30 hours of listening time
      • Up to 20 hours of talk time
      • 5 minutes in the case provides around 1 hour of listening time or around 45 minutes of talk time

    Audio Technology
    • Custom high-excursion Apple driver
    • Custom high dynamic range amplifier
    • Voice Isolation
    • Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking
    • Adaptive EQ
    • Vent system for pressure equalization

    Controls
    • Press once to play or pause media
    • Press once to answer a call or mute or unmute
    • Press twice to end a call
    • Press twice to skip forward
    • Press three times to skip back
    • Press and hold for Siri
    • Say “Hey Siri” or just “Siri” to do things like play a song, make a call, or get directions
    • With Siri Interactions, nod your head yes or gently shake your head no when Siri asks if you want to answer an incoming call, hear a text message, manage notifications, and more

    Sensors
    • Dual beamforming microphones
    • Inward-facing microphone
    • Optical in-ear sensor
    • Motion-detecting accelerometer
    • Speech-detecting accelerometer
    • Force sensor

    Chip
    • H2 headphone chip

    Dust Sweat and Water Resistant
    • Dust, sweat, and water resistant (IP54)

    Connectivity
    • Bluetooth 5.3 wireless technology

    In the Box
    • AirPods 4
    • Charging Case (USB-C)
    • Documentation
    • USB-C Charge Cable sold separately

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Customers say

    Customers find these wireless earbuds to be high-quality with nice sound quality, and consider them worth their price. The fit and reliability receive mixed feedback - while some say they fit well and work well, others report they fall out of the ears and stop working. Battery life is also mixed, with some saying it lasts a long time while others report charging issues. Comfort opinions are divided, with some finding them comfortable while others say they hurt after extended wear.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    Select to learn more

    1275 customers mention sound quality, 1016 positive, 259 negative1,275 customers mention "Sound quality"1,016 positive259 negative
    Customers appreciate the sound quality of these earbuds, noting they are loud and clear, with one customer specifically mentioning crisp highs.
    "Great sound, light, and fit and stay in your ear, you just have place them so they stay, very happy with these. Call me pleasantly surprised." Read more
    "Great sound quality, but unlike other air pods before this you can’t find each individual bud and I unfortunately lost them due to not being able to..." Read more
    "Good sound but every iteration of these ear buds do not charge correctly and I won’t make the mistake of ever buying these again...." Read more
    "These worked for a month, then started having horrible sound quality where the sound coming through would be robotic sounding and I miss most words..." Read more
    1187 customers mention quality, 922 positive, 265 negative1,187 customers mention "Quality"922 positive265 negative
    Customers find these wireless earbuds to be of good quality.
    "...if you can get the ones with the padding around your ear really good quality get the ones with ANC aswell is is good for the value of your money and..." Read more
    "Great product. My only comment is there is no charging cord. But in the instructions it says purchase one separately. I have several, so no problem...." Read more
    "Great quality and price, these air pods are amazing, when you put both of them in it feels like everything else just disappears and you are floating..." Read more
    "...Now both stop working randomly. Full charge. Poor quality must have been rejects. Lesson learned get directly from Apple or not at all." Read more
    601 customers mention value for money, 463 positive, 138 negative601 customers mention "Value for money"463 positive138 negative
    Customers find these wireless earbuds offer good value for money, appreciating their quality and bass performance.
    "...Arrived quickly and on time. Works great and was a great price since purchased during Black Friday sales. Easy to use with no connectivity issues...." Read more
    "They were worth the money in a special deal offered by Amazon, you need to learn how to pair on android devices since it no longer comes with button..." Read more
    "I got the earbuds on Amazon at a good price! But alas there was no charger and these don’t use iPhone chargers. So price wasn’t so great!" Read more
    "...This is my third pair and every single one has been a waste of money. This pair, I’ve had since June and the microphone doesn’t always work on one...." Read more
    985 customers mention fit, 365 positive, 620 negative985 customers mention "Fit"365 positive620 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with how the earbuds sit in their ears, with some reporting they stay securely in place while others mention they fall out easily.
    "...These fall out of my ears if I’m talking/moving around too much; less than with the AirPods Pros but a lot more than with my old second generations...." Read more
    "Great sound, light, and fit and stay in your ear, you just have place them so they stay, very happy with these. Call me pleasantly surprised." Read more
    "Too big for my ears. Within 2 weeks of owning one flew out of my ear cycling. I’m having to go back to older iPods. They fit way better." Read more
    "...I purchased these to replace my old apple earbuds, but these will not stay in my ears. I have to stop every few minutes to try to adjust them" Read more
    841 customers mention reliability, 545 positive, 296 negative841 customers mention "Reliability"545 positive296 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the reliability of these earbuds, with some reporting they work well and perform great, while others mention that they quit working or that the left ear pod stopped functioning.
    "They work great I can use them for most of the day so battery life is good. They automatically connect after you set it up. They charge pretty quick...." Read more
    "Just gave them to my daughter for Christmas and they have already stopped working. So mad that the window to return is only a few days past Christmas" Read more
    "Great 4th Gen Apple iPods. Arrived quickly and on time. Works great and was a great price since purchased during Black Friday sales...." Read more
    "These work well, charging capability is as expected, and was very easy to set up. The case and pods seem durable and do stay connected with troubles...." Read more
    656 customers mention battery life, 391 positive, 265 negative656 customers mention "Battery life"391 positive265 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the battery life of these earbuds, with some praising its amazing performance and quick charging capability, while others report issues with the case not holding a charge and inconsistent performance.
    "...Easy to track if you forget where they are. Long battery life. Great features! Adjustable ear pieces and surface charging would be nice...." Read more
    "I would give it zero stars if I could it is not charging so I can't even turn it on connected to my phone first time using it terrible I'm so upset...." Read more
    "...The battery life is great, and the new case is nice and compact. If you're on the fence, hop over – your ears deserve this little upgrade!" Read more
    "...is almost always totally flat, and even when plugged in they do not charge. There was weird blue gunk at the bottom of one earbud...." Read more
    501 customers mention comfort, 273 positive, 228 negative501 customers mention "Comfort"273 positive228 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the headphones' comfort: while some find them comfortable in their ears and can wear them all day, others report that they hurt after extended use.
    "...Idk the sound works and the person I gave them to said they’re comfortable, but just those three reasons I gave up top makes me give it a 1, because..." Read more
    "It’s really really bulky and uncomfortable when I put them in my ears, the sound is good and everything but also people around you can hear it after..." Read more
    "...these headphones, with them I have a clearer hearing, they are very comfortable without hesitation it was a good purchase do not hesitate to buy it..." Read more
    "The sound quality is phenomenal. However they are enormous. They hurt my ears when I wear them. I’ve never had this issue with other ear phones...." Read more

    • Mark and Dee
      5 out of 5 stars
      LOVE these Airpods!
      Reviewed in the United States on May 7, 2026
      Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I have used Airpods 2 for years. I will have a difficult time when I switch back and forth between all of my Airpods now! These are ten times better than my 2s. The quality, the fit, and the case are all such an upgrade. It's a bit of a challenge to adjust to how they go in/out of the case, and how short they are compared to my 2s, but it's ok, the sound is so much better! I haven't learned how to control them like my old ones, YET. They also have features like noise canceling and adjust to your own ears/head.....That's a project I will get onto when I have some time to sit still and read about it. Overall, I'm thrilled!

    • Michael Jenkins
      5 out of 5 stars
      Easy to use, great sound, and seamless with Apple devices
      Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2026
      Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Picked these up mainly for everyday use — calls, music, and workouts — and they’ve been exactly what I expected from Apple.

      Setup & connectivity (huge plus):

      If you’re already in the Apple ecosystem, setup is basically instant. They connect right away and switch between devices smoothly without any hassle.

      Sound quality:

      Audio is clear and balanced. Not overly bass-heavy, but everything sounds clean whether you’re listening to music, podcasts, or taking calls.

      Comfort & fit:

      Lightweight and comfortable for extended use. They stay in place well during normal activity, including walking and light workouts.

      Call quality:

      Calls have been clear on both ends. No issues with background noise in typical environments.

      Battery life:

      Solid for everyday use. Easily gets through the day with normal listening, and the case makes it easy to recharge on the go.

      What I like from an everyday standpoint:

      • Seamless integration with iPhone and other Apple devices

      • Simple, no-fuss experience

      • Reliable for both calls and media

      Durability & case:

      The case is compact and easy to carry. Everything still feels solid after regular use.

      Minor downside:

      If you’re looking for heavy bass or a highly customizable sound profile, these are more about balance and simplicity.

      2-month update:

      Still using them daily with no issues. Connectivity and battery performance are consistent.

      Bottom line:

      If you want a reliable, easy-to-use pair of earbuds that just work — especially with Apple devices — these are a great choice.

      Read moreRead less

    • Hunter Young
      5 out of 5 stars
      10/10 comfort, connectivity, and sound
      Reviewed in the United States on April 16, 2026
      Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Blown away by these. I’ve owned Powerbeats, studio beats, and JBL, but these are by far the lightest, most comfortable buds I’ve ever had. I actually bought these over the pros cause I heard they were more comfortable, and although I’ve never had the pros I don't see how they could possibly be any better of a fit than this. I work in construction and wanted something I could pop in one ear and forget about and these far exceeded my expectations.

      The sound quality is solid as well, a lot of music is actually mixed and mastered for these headphones due to their popularity and it shows. Very balanced sound, was expecting more higher end than bass but it’s actually comparable to my old beats on the low end without overwhelming the rest of the mix.

      Lastly, the way they are interfaced with iPhone is seamless. My studio beats drove me CRAZY with how difficult they were to connect, constantly flipping open and closing the case trying to get it to connect (and they were more expensive than these LOL). I had these in and listening within 1 minute of opening the package. Not to mention the battery is insane.

      10/10, just buy them, you won’t be disappointed.

      Read moreRead less

    • MiaT
      4 out of 5 stars
      Excellent Sound, But Fit May Not Work for Everyone
      Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
      Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      The Apple AirPods 4 are really impressive overall, and I’d give them a solid four stars. Apple did a great job with sound quality—audio is crisp, balanced, and honestly comes very close to what you’d expect from AirPods Pro (3rd gen). Music sounds full, voices are clear, and they perform well for both calls and everyday listening.

      As expected, the connectivity is seamless. They pair instantly with Apple devices, switch easily between them, and just work without any hassle. That level of convenience is a big plus and one of the main reasons to go with AirPods.

      However, the biggest downside for me is the fit. They just didn’t sit quite right in my ears. After wearing them for a while, they started to hurt, especially during longer listening sessions. I noticed pressure and discomfort that made it hard to keep them in for extended periods.

      I also didn’t feel like they were as secure as I’d like, which makes me hesitant to use them during workouts or when moving around a lot.

      Overall, these earbuds sound great and have all the convenience you’d expect from Apple, but the fit just wasn’t right for me. If they were more comfortable, they’d easily be a five-star product.

      Read moreRead less

    • Sarah
      5 out of 5 stars
      All day comfort and reliable sound that feels effortless
      Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
      Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I bought these because I wanted a pair of wireless earbuds that could handle long listening sessions, workouts, and everyday calls without constant fiddling. The redesign with a shorter stem and a softer contour looked like it would sit more stably in my ears, and the quick press controls seemed handy for skipping tracks or taking a call on the go.

      Pairing in day to day use was straightforward. I just opened the charging case near my phone and tapped connect, and they were ready to go. They stay in place during workouts and commutes, and the ear sensor pauses audio when I take them out which is convenient for quick interruptions or when I need to listen to something short without fumbling with the device.

      What stood out most is the overall clarity of calls and the way music and shows feel more immersive with spatial audio that moves with my head. The sound isn't harsh at higher volumes and the voice isolation helps keep conversations clear even in busy environments. Battery life is solid too with about five hours per charge and a total of around 30 hours with the case, and the charging case itself charges via USB-C which is convenient during travel.

      A small caveat is the learning curve with the quick press controls, which took a moment to get used to. The case is noticeably smaller than the previous generation, but it still adds a bit of bulk when tucked into a pocket. Overall, they feel reliable, comfortable, and genuinely enjoyable to use, delivering a five star experience.

      Read moreRead less
